title: Register Cabinet organ map and Gemini proposed role
goal: Update Cabinet-facing registry expectations so Gemini is represented as proposal-only review/scout capacity and the Ecosystem Registry Map remains the canonical orientation surface.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation
metadata.outcome: Cabinet PR #84 registered Gemini as a proposed proposal-only review/scout role, updated the ecosystem registry and routing brief boundaries, refreshed the generated registry map, and kept Gemini non-schedulable until capability/sandbox preflight.

verified_acceptance.gemini-role-boundary: AGENTS.md and docs/blueprints/agent-routing-brief-v0.md state Gemini is proposed proposal-only capacity after capability/sandbox preflight and not schedulable/einplanbar before that gate.
verified_acceptance.map-entrypoints: README.md and AGENTS.md continue to link rendered/ecosystem-registry-map.mmd prominently.
verified_acceptance.map-regenerated: rendered/ecosystem-registry-map.mmd was regenerated with agent:gemini and proposed edges.
verified_acceptance.no-map-truth: README.md states Mermaid maps are orientation and drift surfaces, not proof of claim truth, merge readiness, runtime correctness or agent authority.
verified_acceptance.proposed-not-schedulable: registry/ecosystem/nodes.json, edges.json and claims.jsonl mark Gemini as proposed proposal-only capacity, not verified or schedulable.

checks: Cabinet PR #84 Validate Ecosystem Map SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #84 Cabinet Bridge Probe SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #84 Validate Cabinet Maintenance Radar SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #84 Project Cards validate SUCCESS
Cabinet PR #84 Installer Shadow Test SUCCESS
local: python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts/tests OK

acceptance.assertion: Cabinet registry or planning docs represent Gemini as proposal-only and explicitly forbid push, merge, runtime mutation and credential context.
README.md and AGENTS.md continue to expose the Ecosystem Registry Map prominently for agents.
The rendered ecosystem registry map is regenerated or a blocked reason is recorded.
The update states that Mermaid maps are orientation surfaces, not proof or authority.
Cabinet represents Gemini as proposed proposal-only capacity, not as verified or schedulable capacity.
